hints.text: Use cv2.dnn.readNet() to load pre-trained models. For YOLO, you need .weights and .cfg files. For faster inference, consider using cv2.dnn.DNN_BACKEND_CUDA if GPU is available
Apply CLAHE (Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization) for lighting normalization: clahe = cv2.createCLAHE(clipLimit=2.0, tileGridSize=(8,8)). Apply to the L channel in LAB color space

Cache the camera calibration matrix to avoid reloading. For pose estimation, use cv2.solvePnP with SOLVEPNP_ITERATIVE flag. Apply Non-Maximum Suppression (cv2.dnn.NMSBoxes) to remove duplicate detections with IoU threshold ~0.4
